recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: The Vast of Night
recommendations.overview: At the dawn of the space-race, two radio-obsessed teens discover a strange frequency over the airwaves in what becomes the most important night of their lives and in the history of their small town.

recommendations.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace
recommendations.overview: Master Yoda must go retrieve secret battle plans. However, things become a little more complicated when a class of younglings join the mission.

recommendations.title: The Manhattan Project
recommendations.overview: A gifted high school student steals plutonium from the secret nuclear weapons facility in his home town in order to construct his own nuclear bomb, win a national science fair, and expose the government's secrets.

recommendations.title: Primer
recommendations.overview: A group of fledgling inventors discover a complex method to manipulate reality. At first, they successfully game the stock market with it, but the consequences of the invention start to catch up with them.

recommendations.title: Chronicle
recommendations.overview: Three high school students make an incredible discovery, leading to their developing uncanny powers beyond their understanding. As they learn to control their abilities and use them to their advantage, their lives start to spin out of control, and th

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Time Trap
recommendations.overview: A group of students become trapped inside a mysterious cave where they discover time passes differently underground than on the surface.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: Timecrimes
recommendations.overview: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.
